spacing_and_layout.container: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8

components.button_primary: bg-[#FF3B30] hover:bg-[#FF453A] text-white font-mono text-sm px-4 py-2 rounded-sm transition-colors
components.button_secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 hover:border-white/40 text-white font-mono text-sm px-4 py-2 rounded-sm transition-colors
components.input: bg-black border border-white/10 rounded-sm text-white focus:border-[#FF3B30] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FF3B30] font-mono text-sm placeholder:text-gray-600

login_background.description: Abstract cryptographic nodes background for the login page overlay.

sample_cover_image.description: Reference sample cover image for steganography algorithm visual processing.

psnr_epoch_graph.description: Static reference plot for PSNR vs Epoch training graphs.

timing_comparison_chart.description: Static reference plot for Steganalysis resistance / Timing comparison.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a full-stack demo for the SGIC project with React/Vite/Tailwind for the frontend. Implement simulated interactive responses for the Embed/Extract flows so the demo feels instant.
Authentication: Implement a mocked Google social login screen using the 'login_background' image behind a dark blur overlay.
Navigation: Add a sticky top nav bar displaying the project title (SGIC) in monospace, allowing switching between Sender, Receiver, and Logout.
Sender Page Layout: Follow the 'Control Room' grid rules (tight gaps, utilizing full height per row). Use cardless or very flat panels (1px border, no shadow, small rounded corners).
Sender Top Section: Image Upload & Controls (Secret message input, secret key input, 'Embed & Send' CTA).
Tabs Component (Sender): Use Shadcn Tabs to switch between 'Metrics', 'Visualizations', and 'Comparison'.
Metrics Tab: Display simulated values for PSNR, SSIM, BPP, Chi-Square, and RS Analysis using strict grid metrics cards.
Visualizations Tab: Render 3 images side-by-side (Original, Stego, Difference x50) using the 'sample_cover_image' to simulate input/output. Below them, render simulated RGB histograms.

Comparison Tab: Render a data table (Methods: LSB, LSB_XOR, DCT, GAN, PROPOSED). The 'PROPOSED' row MUST have a red text color, bold font weight, and a red background tint using the 'table_row_proposed' class.
Receiver Page Layout: Panel for Stego Image Upload, Secret Key input, and 'Extract Message' CTA. Display a recovered text block, a success/failure verification badge, and Bit Error Rate (BER) metric.

Additional Global Panels (Placed on Sender Dashboard or new tabs): 'Robustness Testing' panel showing simulated attack results (Gaussian Noise, JPEG compression). 'Ablation Study' table. 'Graphs' section mapping to the generated static reference plot images.
All text should use 'Inter' for body and 'IBM Plex Mono' for headings, data metrics, tabs, and tables to reinforce the academic cybersecurity aesthetic.
